name: Influence
description: [X]% Critical Hit

name: Length
description: [X]% Damage Inflicted on aligned targets 2 or more cells away from the state bearer

name: Condemnation
description: -20 Force of Will. Reduces the next AP loss suffered by 1, [X] time(s). The effect is reapplied every turn
effect: Per additional 2 levels: reduces 1 more "AP loss" suffered

name: Arcana
description: If the state bearer does not have any armor at end of turn: [X]% of level as Armor

name: Strong Hand
description: Ending a turn adjacent to an enemy applies -[X]% Armor received to it (1 turn)

name: Vital Return
description: Heal: [X]% of HP lost of the caster on killing an enemy (2 activations per turn)

name: lock Steal
description: -10% Damage inflicted with a weapon. When inflicting damage on an enemy with a two-handed weapon: Steals [X]% of level in Lock (1 turn not stackable)
effect: Per additional level: steals +15% of level in Lock

name: Solid Weapon
description: When inflicting damage on an enemy with a weapon: That enemy reduces their damage on the state bearer by -[X] % (1 turn not stackable) The state bearer must have a shield equipped
effect: Per additional level: reduces the DMG by another -5%

name: Counterattack
description: When the state bearer suffers direct close-combat damage once per turn of the attacker: The state bearer inflicts light damage on the attacker ([X]% of level)
effect: Per additional level: +10% of level DMG

name: Nature
description: [X]% Heals performed on an ally adjacent to another ally

name: Wakfu Influence
description: When the state bearer starts their turn with all their WP (or all their QB): [X]% Critical Hit (1 turn)

name: Reinvigoration
description: -10% Heals performed. The state bearer is healed by [X] % of heals performed on their allies

name: Technical Critical
description: The first critical hit in the turn inflicts [X]% additional damageThe following ones inflict -[Y]% less damage
effect: Per additional level: +6% additional DMG -3% less DMG

name: Precaution
description: When ending turn with less than 50% HP: Heals: [X] % of missing HP
effect: Per additional level: +5% of missing health

name: Abandon
description: At the start of the first turn if secondary masteries are <= 0: [X] max WP and [X] Range -[Y]% Armor given and received
effect: Per additional 2 levels: +1 max WP +1 Range -10% armor given/received

name: Courage
description: [X]% non-critical damage and heals inflicted -[X]% critical damage and heals inflicted
effect: Per additional level: +2% non-crit DMG/Heal. -2% crit DMG/Heal

name: Berserk Wakfu
description: When the state bearer starts their turn with 50% or less of their WP (or their QB): [X]% Critical Damage inflicted (1 turn) [Y]% of level as Armor
effect: Per additional level: +3% Critical Damage +100% armor

name: Light Weapons Expert
description: If no other shield dagger or two-handed weapon is equipped at start of fight: [X]% of level in Elemental Mastery [Y]% of Damage inflicted on a target with Armor
effect: Per additional level: +25% level of Elemental Mastery +2% Damage inflicted on a target with Armor

name: About-Turn
description: When the state bearer suffers direct close-combat damage once per turn of the attacker: The state bearer turns toward them.

name: Last Heal
description: Heal [X]% of max HP when below 20% max hp (once per fight)
effect: Per additional level: heal +5% of max HP

name: Evasion
description: At start of fight: [X]% of level as Dodge
effect: Per additional level: +50% of level as Dodge

name: Intermediate Vision
description: [X]% DMG inflicted on targets exactly 3 cells away

name: Interception
description: At start of fight: [X]% of level as Lock
effect: Per additional level: +50% of level as Lock

name: Blood Carapace
description: At start of turn: Converts [X]% of current HP into Armor
effect: Per additional level: +10% current HP converted

name: Vampiric Madness
description: -20% Heals received. When the bearer inflicts damage in a diagonal line: Steals [X]% of damage inflicted

name: Ap Rupture
description: Recover [X] AP when you cause an enemy to lose Armor (2 activations per turn)

name: Rocky Envelope
description: [X]% Armor given

name: Recklessness
description: When the bearer removes all of a target's armor: [X]% damage inflicted for the rest of the turn 30% maximum

name: Added Value
description: Each time indirect dmg inflicted: -[X]% Direct dmg +[X]% Indirect DMG (Max 40%)
effect: Per additional level: -2% Direct DMG +2% Indirect DMG

name: Indirect Force of Will
description: Outside of your turn: [X] FoW. During your turn: -[Y] FoW
effect: Per additional level: +3 FoW outisde of turn. -4 FoW during turn

name: Accumulation
description: -20% Heals performed. For each turn without performing heals: [X]% Heals performed Stackable up to 40%

name: Solidity
description: Reduces direct damage received greater than 20% of max HP by 400% of level (once per round)

name: Tenacity
description: At end of turn if the state bearer has 2 or more AP: [X] Elemental Resistance (1 turn)

name: Escape
description: At start of fight: [X]% Block (1 turn)

name: Propagation
description: When you inflict direct dmg. Once per turn: Inflict [X]% of level as Light damage on enemies aligned with the target
effect: Per additional level: +10% of level as DMG

name: Flee
description: 1 mp After dodging with loss ([X] max per turn)
effect: Per additional 2 levels: +1 max per turn

name: Destruction
description: [X]% Damage from behind -[Y]% frontal and side Damage
effect: Per additional level: +3% Dmg behind -2% frontal/side DMG

name: Armor Length
description: [X]% Armor given to an aligned ally at a distance

name: Flaming Return
description: Gains [X]% of level as Flaming on killing an enemy (1 activation per turn)

name: Dodge Steal
description: -10% Damage inflicted with a weapon. When inflicting damage on an enemy with a two-handed weapon: Steals [X]% of level in Dodge (1 turn not stackable)
effect: Per additional level: +15% of lvl in Dodge

name: Last Armor
description: Receive [X]% of max HP as Armor when below 20% max hp (once per fight)
effect: Per additional level: +5% of max HP as Armor

name: Armor Return
description: Regains [X]% of max HP as Armor by killing an enemy (2 activations per turn)
effect: Per additional 2 levels: +5% of max HP

name: Violent Rupture
description: When you cause an enemy to lose armor: inflict [X]% of level as dmg on the target. (2 activations per turn)

name: Secondary Freezing
description: + [X]% Water dmg when casting a fire/air/earth spell. Stacks up to 30%. consumed on next direct Water dmg.

name: Earthbound
description: [X]% Earth DMG

name: Secondary Burn
description: + [X]% Fire dmg when casting a water/air/earth spell. Stacks up to 30%. consumed on next direct Fire dmg.

name: Ventilation
description: [X]% Air DMG

name: Freezing
description: [X]% Water DMG

name: Secondary Earthbound
description: + [X]% Earth dmg when casting a fire/air/water spell. Stacks up to 30%. consumed on next direct Earth dmg.

name: Secondary Ventilation
description: + [X]% Air dmg when casting a fire/water/earth spell. Stacks up to 30%. consumed on next direct Air dmg.

name: Burn
description: [X]% Fire DMG

name: Poise
description: After suffering a loss of 2 MP: [X] Force of Will (3 turns)
effect: Per additional level: +5 Force of Will

name: Prosperity
description: [X]% to characteristic bonuses received. Affects all characteristic bonuses (Masteries Resistances Armor) received in combat and cast by an entity other than the state bearer.The value is always rounded down.
effect: Per additional level: +3% to characteristic bonuses

name: MP Return
description: Recovers [X] MP on killing an enemy (2 activations per turn)

name: Ruin
description: [X]% Indirect Damage

name: Last Resistance
description: Receive [X] Resistances when below 20% max hp (once per fight)

name: Vitality Well
description: Increases Health Steals performed by [X]%

name: Cyclothymia
description: Even turns: [X] Force of Will. Odd turns: -[X] Force of Will
effect: Per additional level: +10 FoW Even turns. -10 FoW Odd turns

name: Madness
description: [X]% Damage inflicted in a diagonal line

name: Wakfu Conservation
description: - 1 WP max. + 1 wp at end of turn if you did not spend any WP during the turn

name: Theory of Matter
description: [X]% Critical Hit -[X]% Damage and Heals
effect: Per additional level: +50% Crit/ -50% DMG and Heals

name: Dimensionality
description: On the state bearer's first turn:1 WP (non-regenerable)

name: Ambush
description: [X]% Damage Inflicted on targets in close combat

name: Determination
description: - [X]% indirect Damage received
effect: Per additional 2 levels: -15% Indirect Damage received

name: Slow Influence
description: [X]% Critical Hits per turn (max 30)
effect: Per additional level: +1% Critical Hits per turn

name: Focalization
description: -15% Damage inflicted. At start of turn: 25% Damage inflicted if a single enemy was hit the previous turn

name: Altruism
description: [X]% Heals performed on an aligned ally at a distance

name: Poisoned Weapon
description: [X] Damage inflicted with a Weapon. When inflicting damage on an enemy with a two-handed weapon: Incurable (level: AP cost of the weapon) on the enemy and state bearer
effect: Per additional level: +5% DMG infliected with weapon

name: Mania
description: Melee damage removes [X]% of level in Armor from the target -[Y]% Armor received
effect: Per additional level: +50% of lvl in Armor removed. -3% armor received

name: Social Relations
description: [X]% Damage from behind on even turns. [X]% frontal Damage on odd turns
effect: Per additional level: +2% on both effects

name: Clamor
description: -20 Force of Will. Reduces the next MP loss suffered by 1, [X] time(s). The effect is reapplied every turn
effect: Per additional 2 levels: reduces 1 more "MP loss" suffered

name: Berserk Lock
description: When HP are at less than 50%: [X]% of level as Lock
effect: Per additional level: +50% of lvl as Lock

name: Vivacity
description: 1 AP [X] Elemental Resistance

name: Endurance
description: - [X]% to characterstic penalties received. Affects all characterstic penalties (Masteries, Resitances, Armor, Critical Hits, etc.) received in combat and cast by an entity other than the state bearer. The value is always rounded down.

name: Berserk Dodge
description: When HP are at less than 50%: [X]% of level as Dodge
effect: Per additional level: +50% of lvl as Dodge

name: Devastation
description: 1 WP [X] Force of Will
effect: Per additional level: +10 Force of Will

name: Blocking Expert
description: -50 Elemental Resistance, -15% Damage received during a Block

name: Distance Barrier
description: Reduces Ranged Damage suffered by 50% of level [X] times per turn
effect: Per additional level: + 2 times per turn

name: Visibility
description: 1 Range [X] Lock [X] Dodge

name: Wall
description: At start of fight [X]% of level as Armor
effect: Per additional level: +150% of lvl as Armor

name: Melee Barrier
description: Reduces Melee Damage suffered by 50% of level [X] times per turn
effect: Per additional level: + 2 times per turn

name: Swiftness
description: 1 MP [X]% Damage inflicted

name: Slow Evasion
description: [X]% Blocks per turn (max 40)

name: Topology
description: At the start of combat :Any Dodge by the state bearer is converted into Armor, at a rate 1 to [X].Converted Dodge is lost.
effect: Per additional level: the Armor gained increases by 100%

name: Cyclical Ruin
description: 20% indirect Damage in even rounds

name: Frenzy
description: -20% Damage inflicted. At start of turn:10% Damage inflicted per enemy hit in the previous turn.

description: At start of fight: [X]% Critical Hit (1 turn) of [X]% level as Critical Mastery (1 turn)

name: Fury
description: -15% Damage inflicted. At start of turn: 5% Damage inflicted per entity hit in the previous turn.

name: Integrity
description: When healing an ally, if the ally has less than 15% HP: Heal Ally: [X]% of HP max of the target enemy
effect: Per additional level: Heal Ally +7% of HP Max of target

description: At end of turn: Unused AP are carried over to the next turn Max [X] AP

description: At start of fight: All Masteries: [X]% of level. All Resistances: [Y]
effect: Per additional level: +5% of level Masteries +3 resis

name: Lone Wolf

name: Lightness
description: After suffering a loss of 3 MP: [X] Force of Will (3 turns)

name: Moon Scales
description: [X]% Armor received

name: Spines
description: Performing a Block gives Preparation (+[X] Lvl.)

name: Secret of Life
description: At start of fight: Reduces Healing Mastery to 0. 10% Heals performed

name: Critical Hit Expert
description: At end of turn if a critical hit was performed: Heal: [X]% of HP lost of the caster
effect: Per additional level: +2% of HP lost

name: AP Return
description: Recovers [X] AP on killing an enemy (2 activations per turn)
effect: Per additional 2 levels: +1 AP recovered each activation

name: Carnage
description: When HP are above 90%: [X]% of level in Elemental Mastery
effect: Per additional level: +15% of level in Elem Masteries

name: Tolerance
description: At end of turn: 50% of unused MP are carried over to the next turn Max [X] MP

name: Berserk Critical
description: When HP are at less than 50%: [X]% Critical Hit

name: Cicatrização
description: Este pergaminho pode ser aplicado a uma combinação específica de engastes para conferir um efeito único ao item. Segundo o pergaminho, esse efeito pode aumentar se for aplicado a outras peças de equipamento. Acúmulo máximo: 3

name: Distant Ambush
description: [X]% Damage Inflicted on targets 2 cells away (1 cell between the state bearer and the target)

name: Secondary Devastation
description: At start of fight: [X]% Critical Hit [X]% Block [X] Force of Will
effect: Per additional 2 levels: +3% Crit +3% Block +3 force of Will

name: Obstinacy
description: After suffering a loss of 2 AP: [X] Force of Will (3 turns)
effect: Per additional level: +5 Force of Will

name: Persistence
description: At end of turn if the state bearer has 6 or more AP:60 Elemental Resistance (2 turns)

name: Allocentrism
description: If the bearer has no Armor: [X]% Armor given

name: Critical Shield
description: [X] Critical Resistance

name: Constant Evasion
description: [X]% Block

name: Scrupulosity
description: [X]% DMG inflicted on targets 5 cells or further away

name: Art of Concealment
description: -[X]% Damage received when the bearer is not in line of sight [Y]% Damage received when the bearer is in line of sight
effect: Per additional level: -6% dmg received outside of LoS +3% dmg received in LoS

name: Vital Influence
description: When HP are above 90%: [X]% Critical Hit

name: Bashell
description: [X]% Damage inflicted on a target with armor

name: Profit
description: Regains 1 AP by removing 1 AP or MP from an enemy ([X] max per turn)
effect: Per additional level: +1 max per turn

name: Blood Stains
description: For each penalty or loss applied to an enemy: Blood strains +[X] lvls (Blood stains: [X]% dmg received by the caster. max 40%)
effect: Per additional level: +2 lvls of blood stains

name: Conservation
description: When HP are above 90%: [X]% Block

name: Direct Force of Will
description: Outside of your turn: -[X] FoW. During your turn: [Y] FoW
effect: Per additional level: -4 FoW outisde of turn. +3 FoW during turn

name: Paradoxical Influence
description: If a non-critical hit is performed with an elemental spell: [X]% Critical Hit on the following turn

name: Light Strength
description: As long as the bearer has no Armor: [X]% Damage inflicted

name: Critical Scale
description: Each time a non-critical spell is case: [X]% Critical Hit. Bonus is lost on next critical spell

name: Interposition
description: After locking an enemy: [X]% of level as Armor
effect: Per additional level: +50% of lvl as Armor

name: Vital Agility
description: At start of turn if HP are above 90%: 1 MP

name: Reprisal
description: When you suffer ranged direct dmg: 6% extra DMG inflicted on the attacked. 1 turn Non stackable

name: Embellishement
description: At end of turn, per enemy in close combat: [X]% DMG inflicted for the following turn.

name: Rear Shield
description: [X] Rear Resistance

name: Critical Consolation
description: Each time a non-critical spell is cast: +[X]% Critical DMG (Stackable up to 40%). Bonus is lost on next critical spell

name: Vital Strength
description: At start of turn if HP are above 90%: [X] AP

name: Offensive Block
description: When performing a block on a direct enemy attack: [X]% damage inflicted (1 turn) -10% Block

name: Tactical Critical
description: [X]% critical damage inflicted if the target has > 50% HP -[X]% critical damage inflicted if the target has <= 50% HP
effect: Per additional lvl +3% crit DMG if HP>50. -3% crit DMG if HP<=50%

name: Neutrality
description: At the start of the first turn if secondary masteries are <= 0: [X]% damage inflicted

name: Pretension
description: At the start of the first turn if secondary masteries are <= 0: [X]% Block

description: When the bearer starts their turn below 20% HP: [X]% Damage inflicted (1 turn) [Y]% of level as armor
effect: Per additional level: +3% DI +50% of lvl as Armor

description: Ending a turn adjacent to an enemy applies -[X]% Heals performed to it (1 turn)

name: Sensitivity
description: If there are two or more allies 1 to 4 cells from the bearer: [X]% Damage Inflicted

name: Raw Power

effect: Per additional level: -1 max WP +2% DMG

description: -1 Range +[X]% of level as Lock and Dodge
effect: Per additional level: +50% of level as Lock and Dodge

description: Each time a critical hit is performed (5 activations per turn): Preparation (+[X] Lvl.)

name: Locking
description: [X]% Damage inflicted on targets without line of sight 3 or more cells away from the state bearer

description: [X] max AP 75 Elemental Resistance

description: -1 max MP [X]% Damage inflicted
